name: km-triage-app
description: Helpers for the km-triage GitHub App and sweep: one-time setup, installation-token mint, sweep bootstrap, diff caching, progress/check-run/audit emission. Used by .claude/commands/km-triage.md so PR-mutating actions are attributed to km-triage[bot] and so the required km-triage/review check-run (the actual merge gate on main) can be published.
